title: Buttery Crispy Italian Chicken Liver Stir-fry
description: A buttery and crispy indulgent Italian dish featuring chicken liver, perfectly seasoned and stir-fried to perfection with a blend of aromatic Italian herbs and spices.
instructions: Prepare the chicken liver by removing any excess fat and cutting into bite-sized pieces. Season with salt, pepper, and a bit of red pepper flakes if desired.
Mix together flour, Italian herbs blend, olive oil in a bowl until well combined. Add the prepared chicken liver to this mixture and toss until evenly coated.

Heat about 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Once hot, place the seasoned chicken liver pieces into the pan. Cook for approximately 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
Drizzle remaining tablespoon of olive oil over the top of the chicken liver to create a delicious buttery crust. Stir in minced garlic during the last minute of cooking.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or as a spread with whole grain bread for an indulgent meal.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
